news.title:
IDFC First Bank confirms claims stem from a previous branch incident, not new.
Bank commits to recovering funds and taking action against perpetrators.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank confirms claims stem from a previous branch incident, not new.
Bank commits to recovering funds and taking action against perpetrators.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank pays ₹645 Cr for Chandigarh claims, ₹55 Cr above estimate.
Total deposits steady at ₹2,92,381 Cr as of Feb 28, 2026.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank pays ₹645 Cr for Chandigarh claims, ₹55 Cr above estimate.
Total deposits steady at ₹2,92,381 Cr as of Feb 28, 2026.

news.title:
Haryana Vigilance investigates ₹590-cr IDFC Bank fraud, freezing multiple accounts.
Public can appeal if their accounts are mistakenly frozen during the probe.
news.summary:
Haryana Vigilance investigates ₹590-cr IDFC Bank fraud, freezing multiple accounts.
Public can appeal if their accounts are mistakenly frozen during the probe.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank valuation shifts from fair to expensive, reducing price attractiveness.
P/E and P/BV ratios exceed historical and peer averages, Mojo Grade downgraded to Hold.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank valuation shifts from fair to expensive, reducing price attractiveness.
P/E and P/BV ratios exceed historical and peer averages, Mojo Grade downgraded to Hold.

news.title:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.
news.summary:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.

news.title:
₹6,000 Cr frauds in IDFC First Bank, PNB, SBI raise concerns over governance and risk controls.
IDFC faces Rs 590 Cr fraud; PNB reports Rs 2,434 Cr loss; SBI flags RCom's Rs 700 Cr diversion.
news.summary:
₹6,000 Cr frauds in IDFC First Bank, PNB, SBI raise concerns over governance and risk controls.
IDFC faces Rs 590 Cr fraud; PNB reports Rs 2,434 Cr loss; SBI flags RCom's Rs 700 Cr diversion.

news.title:
ED probes IDFC Bank fraud involving Rs 590 crore linked to Haryana govt.
Haryana Vigilance intensifies investigation; ED seeks FIR copy for further action.
news.summary:
ED probes IDFC Bank fraud involving Rs 590 crore linked to Haryana govt.
Haryana Vigilance intensifies investigation; ED seeks FIR copy for further action.

news.title:
Fraud at IDFC First Bank highlights survival challenges in Indian banking.
HDFC Bank emerged as the largest private bank after absorbing weaker peers.
news.summary:
Fraud at IDFC First Bank highlights survival challenges in Indian banking.
HDFC Bank emerged as the largest private bank after absorbing weaker peers.

news.title:
Keynote Capitals Ltd issued a Sell report on IDFC First Bank.
Current market price of IDFC First Bank is Rs.73.5 as of Feb 27, 2026.
news.summary:
Keynote Capitals Ltd issued a Sell report on IDFC First Bank.
Current market price of IDFC First Bank is Rs.73.5 as of Feb 27, 2026.

news.title:
Probe reveals Rs 590 crore fraud at IDFC First Bank; Rs 25 crore diverted using forged cheques.
SIT investigates Rs 46.56 crore transfers; suspects forged IAS officer signatures on cheques and debit notes.
news.summary:
Probe reveals Rs 590 crore fraud at IDFC First Bank; Rs 25 crore diverted using forged cheques.
SIT investigates Rs 46.56 crore transfers; suspects forged IAS officer signatures on cheques and debit notes.

news.title:
BoFA downgraded IDFC First Bank to 'neutral' from 'outperform', cutting its price target to ₹75 from ₹95.
A ₹590 crore fraud disclosure led to a 20% stock drop; analysts predict disruptions to CASA, deposit, and loan growth.
news.summary:
BoFA downgraded IDFC First Bank to 'neutral' from 'outperform', cutting its price target to ₹75 from ₹95.
A ₹590 crore fraud disclosure led to a 20% stock drop; analysts predict disruptions to CASA, deposit, and loan growth.

news.title:
Haryana ACB probes alleged forgery involving IDFC First Bank, AU Small Finance Bank.
A committee recommended police investigation into procedural lapses by bank officials.
news.summary:
Haryana ACB probes alleged forgery involving IDFC First Bank, AU Small Finance Bank.
A committee recommended police investigation into procedural lapses by bank officials.

news.title:
Banks tighten scrutiny on high-value branch transactions post IDFC First Bank's 590 crore fraud.
Lenders plan explicit systems to monitor high-value cheque-based transactions effectively.
news.summary:
Banks tighten scrutiny on high-value branch transactions post IDFC First Bank's 590 crore fraud.
Lenders plan explicit systems to monitor high-value cheque-based transactions effectively.

news.title: IDFC First Bank confirms full payment of INR 583 crore to Haryana government.
news.summary: IDFC First Bank confirms full payment of INR 583 crore to Haryana government.

news.title:
Filatex Fashions, Vodafone Idea, and IDFC First Bank were among the most traded NSE stocks amid market volatility and profit booking.
Filatex surged nearly 14%, IDFC First Bank rose 1%, while Vodafone Idea fell 1%, reflecting mixed investor sentiment.
news.summary:
Filatex Fashions, Vodafone Idea, and IDFC First Bank were among the most traded NSE stocks amid market volatility and profit booking.
Filatex surged nearly 14%, IDFC First Bank rose 1%, while Vodafone Idea fell 1%, reflecting mixed investor sentiment.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank to resolve Rs 590 crore issue with Haryana govt; Mobikwik enters equity broking via subsidiary.
Bharti Airtel invests Rs 20,000 crore in NBFC; BPCL faces Rs 1,816.7 crore tax demand from Kochi excise dept.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank to resolve Rs 590 crore issue with Haryana govt; Mobikwik enters equity broking via subsidiary.
Bharti Airtel invests Rs 20,000 crore in NBFC; BPCL faces Rs 1,816.7 crore tax demand from Kochi excise dept.

news.title:
Haryana's Vigilance Bureau arrested 4 individuals in a ₹590 crore IDFC First Bank fraud case.
Among those arrested, 2 are ex-IDFC First Bank employees, and 2 are private firm owners.
news.summary:
Haryana's Vigilance Bureau arrested 4 individuals in a ₹590 crore IDFC First Bank fraud case.
Among those arrested, 2 are ex-IDFC First Bank employees, and 2 are private firm owners.

news.title:
Haryana CM and RBI governor assure safety of ₹590-cr after alleged fraud in IDFC First Bank.
The fraud involved state government accounts, raising concerns over fund security.
news.summary:
Haryana CM and RBI governor assure safety of ₹590-cr after alleged fraud in IDFC First Bank.
The fraud involved state government accounts, raising concerns over fund security.

news.title:
Banks may invest ₹7T in G-secs in FY27 as SLR holdings decline.
ICICI Bank's treasury head highlights rising deposit base driving G-sec investments.
news.summary:
Banks may invest ₹7T in G-secs in FY27 as SLR holdings decline.
ICICI Bank's treasury head highlights rising deposit base driving G-sec investments.

news.title:
IDFC First Bank released Feb 2026 analyst call audio on its website.
The release shares insights discussed with investors as part of regulatory disclosure.
news.summary:
IDFC First Bank released Feb 2026 analyst call audio on its website.
The release shares insights discussed with investors as part of regulatory disclosure.
